---
title: Excel to R: Perspective of a Financial Analyst
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

install.packages("tidyverse")
install.packages("sos")
install.packages("janitor")
```


setting github
use_git_config(user.name = "haganistic", user.email = "alejandro.hagan@outlook.com")


# Admin how to set up your working space

## Manipulating working directories

getwd()

setwd()

list.files(pattern=$^, recursive=T)


`.` is equal to your working director `getwd()`


## Creating folders & filing guidelines 

file.exists
dir.exists
basename("c:/filedir/file.txt") -> "file.txt
dirname("c:/filedir/file.txt")->

create.dir("./newdir")
file.create("filename.txt")
shell.exec("filename.txt")
filesstrings::move_file("c:home/filename.txt","c:newdir")
file.copy("filename", "destination")
file.rename("existing file name","new file name")
-must be in the same directory
file.choose()
base::unlink("filename", recursive=T)
-recursve must be T to delete directories

[Link to learn more](http://theautomatic.net/2018/07/11/manipulate-files-r/#:~:text=Files%20can%20be%20deleted%20with%20R%20using%20unlink.,parameter%20recursive%20%3D%20TRUE.%20%23%20delete%20a%20file)


# How to manipulate & tidy data

## how to import data

read.csv()

read_csv()

fread()

## how to change column types





 



## how to create data
seq()
runif()
sample(data,# of times, replace,)
c()
data.frame()


## how to import files
